name: aml-pep-requested-gate
rationale: Clean intake + complete docs + status='active' progresses past F2.PD preliminary-review. Once prelim is approved by admin, F2.AP aml_pep_requested_at gate fires — Vienna sends AML/PEP documentation request to broker. Tests the post-prelim AML/PEP request issuance.
notes: Single-event intake. Phase 4 spec note: F2.AP is well-trodden anchor with single scenario coverage per matrix design; assertion-thoroughness compensates.
